title: Company-Led Training (CLT) Programme
text:
Company-Led Training (CLT) Programme - SupportGoWhere
Company-Led Training (CLT) Programme
Share link
Deepen your tech and media skills through on-the-job training in emerging tech and media areas such as artificial intelligence, cyber security, data analytics and virtual production.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
On-the-job training for in-demand tech and media skills
Work on projects guided by experienced mentors
Enhance your employability and career pathways in tech and media roles
Collapse all sections
About this support

Gain employment and receive a salary while being equipped with in-demand tech and media skills

Work on projects guided by experienced mentors

Gain in-depth industry exposure

Enhance your employability and career pathways in tech and media roles

Who is this for?

Participating organisations must:

Be a Singapore-registered company.

Employ professionals in tech and media job roles that are in demand by the industry.

Have the capability and capacity to deliver training programmes, with a good track record in human resource development.

Commit resources including practical projects and qualified mentors to support trainees’ learning.

Provide structured career progression pathways based on skills and competencies.

Ensure that Singapore Permanent Residents (SPRs) do not exceed 15% of total trainees who have completed training.

How to apply?

You can visit the list of eligible companies and apply via the partners' website.

Where can I find help?

View more details

IMDA Hotline: 6377 3800

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 19 Feb 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
